title: The Fundamentals of LaRouche's Economics — Class 1
description:
Participate in future classes: https://bit.ly/lar-econ

If anyone should be unemployed now, it should be the useless economists that destroyed our productive economy and created the basis for this pandemic. What nearly everyone on the planet thinks economics is, is completely wrong. It's not money. It's not finance, or world trade. In this class, I'll introduce to you Lyndon LaRouche's discoveries in the science of physical economy, which overturn every single chapter in your economics text book and are the basis of his forecasting of this pandemic twenty years ago. It's not true that, "No one could see this coming."
